title: Living in Boulder vlog 7 - 20 - 2017: Bike Errands, Rode with mom

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder while sick, describing a day of bike-related errands: buying a handlebar bag, water bottle cages, lights, and a new microphone (Apogee) at the Apple Store, plus replacing broken glasses. He plans to ride with his mom later and mentions wanting to try Zwift for virtual cycling.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Excited about it — thinks riding virtually with others is amazing
Doesn't want bags under the seat so he has room for water access

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I just got a new microphone from the Apple store, the Apogee.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm testing the sound quality of the new microphone.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Last night, I couldn't breathe and was laying in bed all night, which caused me to sleep during the day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't have to work today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got a top bag for my bike that can hold five power bars and a Jelp.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I ordered another bag that goes under the handlebars.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might get a third bag that hooks onto the frame later.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't want to put any bags under my seat because I might need space for water.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm considering getting a bigger seat for the back.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I bought two more water bottle cages for $60 each.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got lights for my bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I bought a bolt for my bike tip to hold a water bottle holder.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to the armory to get the bolt.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I bought a new microphone and am setting up my stuff.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I replaced my broken glasses for $60.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been waiting for my mom to call me so we can go on a short backpack ride.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: After the backpack ride, I might go on a terror ride if there's still daylight.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to do a couple of strata statements but don't understand some of them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll include the strata statements in my daily routine.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to try Zwift when I can ride on a roller.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The Zwift piece is only $10.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not selling the Zwift piece; you need real diapers with other people.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm looking forward to testing the new microphone.
